_README: Verified reference facts that no free feed provides (bond effective duration; real 30-day SEC yield where the factsheet gives it). Each ticker row carries its source (issuer factsheet) and as_of (factsheet date). Values read directly from the official factsheet PDFs on 2026-07-03; PDFs archived in ./_factsheets/. Refresh each quarter when new factsheets publish.
